summary: Simple top-freezer models tend to outlast feature-heavy French-door refrigerators.
care_tip: Vacuum condenser coils yearly and keep door seals clean and tight.

summary: Repair access, drum bearings and control-board design separate the long runners from the rest.
care_tip: Leave the door ajar, use less detergent and clean the pump filter monthly.

summary: Vent cleaning matters more than smart features. Basic vented dryers remain the easiest to repair.
care_tip: Clean the lint path often and inspect the full exhaust vent every six months.

summary: Water hardness, filter care and parts support have a large effect on working life.
care_tip: Rinse the filter monthly and run a descaling cycle in hard-water areas.

summary: Gas ranges often last longest, while electronic controls are the main weak point in modern ovens.
care_tip: Keep burners clear and avoid heavy use of high-heat self-cleaning cycles.

summary: Countertop units are usually replaced rather than repaired once the magnetron fails.
care_tip: Never run it empty and keep the waveguide cover free of grease and food.
